title: K-200 Airframe Design Analysis
text:
# K-200 Airframe Design Analysis

Document number: MD-DOC-459-F. Revision: F. Type: design-note. Author: Lena Okafor. Created: 2023-08-30. Last modified: 2024-06-26. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Airframe subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1108, P-1126.
